title: Touchups for registries.conf across a few man pages
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Adds registries.conf link/info to a number of podman pages. This along with a change in container/images (https://github.com/containers/image/pull/465) should complete #789

comments.body: no details to what the failures are, going to kick it.
@TomSweeneyRedHat I think you might need to repush.
repushed and added "container" before "registiries" in a few places.

:pushpin: Commit e0f3761 has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan e0f37617b0c5f5ab05267de73b1cf44218b8e4d0 -->
:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
